message:
chore: add Snipping_*.png to .gitignore

Ignore browser snipping tool screenshot artifacts that are
created during UI development and testing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -120,3 +120,6 @@ apps/web/public/registry.manifest.json
 .bv/
 a.out
 .env*.local
+
+# Screenshots (browser snipping tool artifacts)
+Snipping_*.png
